recommendations.title: North Face
recommendations.overview: North Face tells the story of two German climbers Toni Kurz and Andreas Hinterstoisser and their attempt to scale the deadly North Face of the Eiger.

recommendations.title: Erased
recommendations.overview: A former agent of the CIA and his estranged daughter go on the run after his employers target them for assassination.

recommendations.title: The Royal Game
recommendations.overview: 1938. While the Nazi troops march into Vienna, the lawyer Josef Bartok hastily tries to escape to the USA with his wife but is arrested by the Gestapo. Bartok remains steadfast and refuses to cooperate with the Gestapo that requires confidential info

recommendations.title: A Royal Affair
recommendations.overview: A young queen falls in love with her physician, and they start a revolution that changes their nation forever.

recommendations.title: Twelve Monkeys

recommendations.title: The Count of Monte Cristo

recommendations.title: The Horseman on the Roof
recommendations.overview: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

recommendations.title: Ed Wood
recommendations.overview: The mostly true story of the legendary "worst director of all time", who, with the help of his strange friends, filmed countless B-movies without ever becoming famous or successful.

recommendations.title: Hotel Mumbai
